chunks.title: The Woman Restores Her Property
chunks.reason: A complete narrative unit where the woman returns from exile and regains her estate through Elisha's servant.

chunks.title: Elisha and Hazael in Damascus
chunks.reason: A continuous dialogue sequence involving the sick king, Hazael's visit, Elisha's prophecy, and Hazael's accession.

chunks.title: Reign of Joram of Judah
chunks.reason: A historical summary covering the reign, character, military failures, and death of King Joram.

chunks.title: Reign of Ahaziah and War at Ramoth-gilead
chunks.reason: A narrative block detailing the short reign of Ahaziah and the joint military campaign against Aram.
